creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2008-06-01 12:34:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/mpdscribble    Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/mpdscribble/files patch-setup.sh 
  Log:
  - Do not assume /bin/sh is bash in setup.sh
  - Install setup.sh as mpdscribble-setup which is required at runtime
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/122993
  Submitted by:   Sokolov Alexey <sokolov at truebsd.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +5 -1      ports/audio/mpdscribble/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/audio/mpdscribble/files/patch-setup.sh (new)
